file: 1556_Kollman 等 - 2023 - Towards jet fuel from technical lignins Feedstock-catalyst-product interactions revealed during cat.txt

experiments.description: 使用DAB-Ru催化剂系统，在不同时间（1、3、6小时）、温度（260、280、300、320°C）和氢气负载（2和4 MPa）下处理松木硫酸盐木质素（BCL）和硬木生物精炼木质素（HWAER），以研究工艺条件对氢解的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: Time and temperature variation simulated a range of process severities... BCL and HWAER were treated using DAB-Ru at various times (1, 3, and 6 h), temperatures (260, 280, 300, and 320 ◦C), and hydrogen loadings (2 and 4 MPa at room temperature) to determine process condition impact on hydrogenolysis of the two most different feedstocks

experiments.description: 在280°C、3小时、4 MPa H2的条件下，使用三种不同的催化剂系统（DAB-Ru、CoZn和RuZnAc）对三种木质素原料（BCL、HWK和HWAER）进行氢解，以探索原料、催化剂和产物之间的相互作用。
experiments.text_snippet: three lignin-rich feedstocks (BCL, HWK, and HWAER) were reacted at 280 ◦C for 3 h with 4 MPa H2 using three catalytic systems (DAB-Ru, CoZn, and RuZnAc)

experiments.description: 在280°C、3小时、0.321 mmol Ru +Zn 每克木质素的条件下，使用均相锌（Ru/C, ZnAc）和沸石负载锌（Ru/C, Zn/DeAl H-beta）催化剂处理BCL和HWAER，以比较均相与固体酸锌的效果。
experiments.text_snippet: zinc supported by dealuminated H-beta zeolite was synthesized and physically mixed with Ru/C to generate additional data... Reaction conditions: 280 ◦C, 3 h, 0.321 mmol Ru +Zn per gram lignin, 300 RPM.

Product yield.original: Reported as weight percentages in figures and tables (e.g., BCL: 60.7% oligomers, 28.5% monomers/dimers; HWAER: 40.5% oligomers, 28.4% monomers/dimers with RuZnAc)

Product Selectivity.value: Towards alkylated phenols, guaiacols, and syringols; increased severity selective towards alkylated phenols
Product Selectivity.original: Towards alkylated phenols, guaiacols, and syringols; increased severity selective towards alkylated phenols

Catalyst composition.value: Ruthenium on carbon combined with persulfate and potassium oxide on titanium dioxide
Catalyst composition.original: Ruthenium on carbon combined with persulfate and potassium oxide on titanium dioxide
